overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring a nighttime drive through heavy rain on urban highways and tunnels. The vehicle navigates through beige concrete tunnels, elevated highways with holographic billboards, and winding mountain roads with palm trees.

approaching tunnel exit, daylight visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the vehicle entering a beige concrete tunnel. Fluorescent lights line the ceiling as the vehicle follows another car through the rain-slicked tunnel, approaching the bright exit at the far end.

events.description: exiting tunnel onto elevated highway with city views
navigating curved highway ramp and overpass

large illuminated advertisements with pink and blue neon lighting
tall sodium vapor street lamps along the highway edge
concrete overpass structure crossing above the highway

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the vehicle emerges onto an elevated highway at night. Neon billboards glow in the distance while the vehicle navigates curved ramps and overpasses, with metal guardrails lining the rain-soaked asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway exit ramp leading to winding mountain road

transitioning from highway to winding mountain road with palm trees

segments.scene_description: The vehicle takes a highway exit past a holographic billboard, transitioning to a winding mountain road with yellow guardrails. Palm trees and rocky hillsides flank the road as the vehicle approaches a second tunnel entrance.

agents.ego_description: driving through the second tunnel, navigating a slight curve

entered.detail: gray concrete tunnel walls with horizontal construction seams

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a second tunnel with gray concrete walls and bright fluorescent lighting. The rain is temporarily left behind as the vehicle follows another car through the short tunnel toward the distant exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain road with palm trees and guardrails

events.description: exiting second tunnel back to winding mountain road

agents.ego_description: navigating the winding mountain road with palm trees and rocky terrain on either side

entered.detail: yellow-painted metal guardrails continuing along the road
palm trees visible again along the right side of the road
rocky hillside and vegetation on the left

segments.scene_description: Exiting the second tunnel, the vehicle returns to the winding mountain road with yellow guardrails. Palm trees and rocky terrain line the rain-soaked asphalt as the vehicle continues along the curved path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive that transitions from a sterile urban tunnel system into a rain-soaked mountain landscape. It begins inside a beige concrete tunnel lined with fluorescent lights, following another vehicle toward a bright exit. As the car emerges, the scene opens onto an elevated nighttime highway where neon billboards glow over curved ramps and rain-slicked asphalt. The vehicle then exits the highway past a holographic billboard, shifting from the city's glow to a winding mountain road flanked by palm trees and rocky hillsides. After a brief passage through a second gray concrete tunnel, the camera finally returns to the open air, continuing along the curved mountain path under the falling rain.
